title: FY 2022-2023 - 2nd Quarter
first_page_excerpt:
STAFF REPORT 
CITY oF OCEANSIDE 
DATE: 
March 22, 2023 
TO: 
Honorable Mayor and City Councilmembers 
FROM: 
Financial Services Department 
SUBJECT: FY 2022-23 SECOND QUARTER FINANCIAL STATUS REPORT 
SYNOPSIS 
Staff submits the second quarter Financial Status Report and recommends that the City 
Council accept the report and approve the budget adjustments. 
BACKGROUND 
The City Council adopted the FY 2022-23 budgets on June 8, 2022, with approved 
General Fund revenues of $188.91 million and expenditures of $186.85 million. The 
City's adopted budget for all funds is $569.79 million in revenues and $592.72 million in 
expenditures. The budget for all funds includes non-operating budgets such as CIP 
projects which uses fund balance along with expected revenues.
